summary: A produced interview filmed against a plain black background. A man in a dark plaid suit with a U.S. flag lapel pin and a woman with long graying hair in a patterned top sit side by side, speaking to an off-camera interviewer. The footage alternates between two-shots and closer single shots as they talk.

script.scene: A man in a plaid suit and a woman in a patterned top sit side by side against a black background, speaking.
A closer shot of the man speaking, the woman partly visible beside him.
The interview continues with the pair against the black backdrop.
